[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111011 6
1 1011111 6
2 1111111 a
3 1111111 a
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

67 76 0100100 2
70 07 1101010 4
